narrative:
87 Ohio House district has 75,580 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.3% D−R vs -30.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
